---
title: "Front Pages"
---

<div id="date-navigation">
  <button id="prev-date">←</button>
  <span id="current-date"></span>
  <button id="next-date">→</button>
</div>
<div id="newspaper-grid" class="grid"></div>

<style>
.grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}
.newspaper-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
}
.newspaper-row img {
    width: 350px !important;
    height: 550px !important;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    object-fit: cover;
    margin: 0;  /* Remove any default margins */
}
#date-navigation {
  margin: 20px 0;
  text-align: center;
}
#date-navigation button {
  padding: 5px 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
</style>

<script>
// Function to format date in YYYYMMDD format
function formatDate(date) {
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${year}${month}${day}`;
}

// Function to format date for display
function formatDisplayDate(date) {
  return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 
    weekday: 'long',
    year: 'numeric', 
    month: 'long', 
    day: 'numeric' 
  });
}

// Current date object
let currentDate = new Date();

// Newspaper IDs
const newspapers = {
  "The Hindu": "9ww5",
  "The Indian Express": "1390",
  "Hindustan Times": "9049",
  "Mint": "4a91",
  "Business Standard": "1396",
  "The Hindu BusinessLine": "9wvw",
  "The Washington Post": "1047",
  "The Guardian": "1545"
};

// Function to generate PressReader URLs for a specific date and page
function generatePressReaderURL(newspaperId, date, page) {
  const dateStr = formatDate(date);
  if (page === 1) {
    return `https://t.prcdn.co/img?file=${newspaperId}${dateStr}00000000001001`;
  } else {
    return `https://t.prcdn.co/img?file=${newspaperId}${dateStr}00000000001001&page=${page}&scale=36`;
  }
}

// Function to load newspapers for a specific date
function loadNewspapers(date) {
  const grid = document.getElementById("newspaper-grid");
  grid.innerHTML = ""; // Clear the grid
  
  // Update display date
  document.getElementById("current-date").textContent = formatDisplayDate(date);
  
  for (const [name, id] of Object.entries(newspapers)) {
    const newspaperDiv = document.createElement("div");
    newspaperDiv.className = "newspaper-row";
    
    // Add images for pages 1, 2, and 3
    for (let page = 1; page <= 3; page++) {
      const url = generatePressReaderURL(id, date, page);
      const img = document.createElement("img");
      img.src = url;
      img.alt = `${name} - Page ${page}`;
      img.style.width = "100%";
      img.style.height = "auto";
      newspaperDiv.appendChild(img);
    }
    
    grid.appendChild(newspaperDiv);
  }
}

// Set up event listeners and initial load
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Initial load
  loadNewspapers(currentDate);
  
  // Previous date button
  document.getElementById("prev-date").addEventListener("click", function() {
    currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() - 1);
    loadNewspapers(currentDate);
  });
  
  // Next date button
  document.getElementById("next-date").addEventListener("click", function() {
    currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() + 1);
    loadNewspapers(currentDate);
  });
});
</script>
